items.headline: American Express Targets Travelers And Sports Fans While Shares Trade Below Estimates
items.summary: American Express (NYSE:AXP) introduced new travel benefits and refreshed card designs for Delta SkyMiles Card Members. The company launched rideshare credits and additional baggage allowance on certain Delta SkyMiles products with no fee increase. American Express also announced a global partnership with Fanatics focused on payments and sports related engagement. For American Express, travel and experiences remain central to the value proposition, particularly for premium card members who...

items.headline: ‘Citibank and Amex Have Screwed an 85-Year-Old Widow’: Dave Ramsey on $45,000 in Credit Card Debt With No Assets
items.summary: On a recent episode of The Ramsey Show, a caller named Michelle from New York described a situation many adult children quietly dread. After her father passed away in July, she discovered her 85-year-old widowed mother had accumulated $45,000 across 5 credit cards, including American Express and two Citibank cards.
